restroom_floor_drains.text: Restroom floor drains: one front-center of every group of 2 or more urinals; one per water-closet group, two when the group has 4 or more water closets. All with trap primers; slope floors 1/8 in./ft.

citations.note: Student+staff RRs: 1 front-center per 2+ urinals; 1 per WC group, 2 if ≥4 WCs.

locations.text: At all student restroom entries (interior and exterior)

fountains.notes: MVP simplified unit mapping: single age band served → DF-12 (child height); multiple bands served or outdoor/public mixed use → DF-12A (dual height) — prefer dual-height when both bands are served. Classroom-attached single restrooms (kindergarten pattern) do not generate corridor entry fountains — see OQ-7.

citations.note: Combination fountain + bottle filler at all student RR entries (int+ext), MPR/auditoria lobbies, play areas/fields, lunch shelters.

fountains.todo: OQ-5: verify the DF-12 vs DF-12A unit-selection mapping; OQ-7: confirm entry-fountain treatment at classroom-attached restrooms.
